stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An aircraft is executing the ILSz approach on Runway 03. What is the location of the Missed Approach Point (MAPt)?

options.a: Where the DA intercepts the glide path, being at 273ft.
options.b: At the threshold where the NT DME reads 0NM.
options.c: 550m from the threshold as performance categories A, B, C, D specify.
